title: 最強ムテキのネイチャさん？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm passing by the stress stump...

HRAAAH! C'MON! MAKE ME ONE OF THE
STARS ALREADYYY!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Eek! You heard that?!
choice_data_list: What in the world are you doing?
What in the world are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well... Isn't this where we're supposed to yell
all our troubles away?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I was just trying to get over a race I had recently...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh! ♪ Looks like the great Tokai Teio has crushed yet another scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everything was perfect! I had the win in the bag!
But that darn Teio just had to...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Dang it, dang it, dang it! I can't believe this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...So, yeah. I just really wanted to vent my
frustration.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I just feel more embarrassed than anything.
What's a background extra like me doing trying
to have a character arc, huh? Ahahaha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well now, what's this? I figured Helios was out
rantin' again, but it's just you, Nature.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me... You're still hung up on losing to
Teio?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Palmer... Hmph. No comment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
C'mon now, don't be like that. I know just how
you feel, but you won't get anywhere pouting like
that. You just need to outrun your weaker self!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wait, are you saying I should face her
head-on?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha, nah. I mean you've gotta ditch the
"ordinary" and start thinking about the
"extraordinary"!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just imagine escaping into a world of positivity
where you stand at the top and reign as number
one. After all, dreaming is free, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...You say that, but I have no idea how to picture
that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Initially bewildered by what seems an impossible
feat, Nice Nature follows Mejiro Palmer's advice
and manages to unleash her imagination...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"She's done it! She won! And now... Nice Nature
stands atop that glorious stage!"

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"From this day on, I shall no longer be a Bronze
Collector but a Gold Collector!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's the spirit! Now that's what I call an
explosive escape from reality!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah! No, no, no! There's no way I could ever
show off like this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! What're you getting all bashful about? I'll
always be here for you if you need anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But hey, a little daydreaming did you some good,
right? Now you can get back to trying your best,
bit by bit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh, Palmer. That's easier said than done!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess I can try it for a while. Might as well
see what happens.
